title.zh: 谷歌研发新AI芯片提升Gemini效率
title.en: Google developing new AI chip to boost Gemini efficiency

summary.zh: 谷歌正在研发一款新型AI芯片，旨在显著提升其Gemini模型的运行效率。此举可能降低AI推理成本，推动更广泛的AI应用部署。
summary.en: Google is working on a new AI chip designed to make its Gemini models much more efficient. This could reduce AI inference costs and enable broader deployment of AI applications.

title.zh: OpenAI担忧开源模型，美国是否应效仿？
title.en: OpenAI fears open-weight models; should the US follow suit?

summary.zh: OpenAI对开源权重模型表示担忧，讨论是否应禁止中国等国家的开源LLM。这反映了AI商业模式与国家安全之间的权衡。
summary.en: OpenAI expresses concerns about open-weight models, raising questions about banning such LLMs from countries like China. This highlights the balance between AI business models and national security.

title.zh: 索尼起诉Udio AI音乐生成器涉及3万首歌曲版权侵权
title.en: Sony sues Udio AI music generator for copyright infringement on 30,000 songs

summary.zh: 索尼音乐起诉AI音乐生成器Udio，指控其侵犯超过3万首歌曲的版权。案件凸显了AI生成内容在版权法下的法律挑战。
summary.en: Sony Music sues AI music generator Udio for copyright infringement on over 30,000 songs. The case underscores legal challenges for AI-generated content under copyright law.

title.zh: AI在数学证明中超越人类提供反例的能力
title.en: AI outperforms human mathematicians in providing counterexamples

summary.zh: AI系统在寻找数学反例方面开始超越人类数学家，展示了机器学习在理论研究中的潜力。这可能加速数学发现和验证过程。
summary.en: AI systems are beginning to outperform human mathematicians in finding counterexamples, showcasing the potential of machine learning in theoretical research. This could accelerate mathematical discovery and verification.

title.zh: 智能体群与新型模型经济学
title.en: Agent swarms and the new model economics

summary.zh: 探讨AI智能体群的经济影响，分析如何通过多智能体协作优化AI模型的使用成本和效率。对开发者来说，这是理解AI扩展和资源管理的关键。
summary.en: Explores the economic impact of AI agent swarms, analyzing how multi-agent collaboration can optimize costs and efficiency of AI model usage. Key for developers to understand AI scaling and resource management.

title.zh: 长时序模型时代的安全与对齐
title.en: Safety and alignment in an era of long-horizon models

summary.zh: OpenAI分享从部署长时序AI模型中学到的教训，包括新的安全风险、观察到的故障以及通过迭代部署改进的安全措施。对AI安全研究人员至关重要。
summary.en: OpenAI shares lessons from deploying long-horizon AI models, covering new safety risks, observed failures, and improved safeguards through iterative deployment. Crucial for AI safety researchers.

title.zh: GPT-Red：通过自我博弈解锁鲁棒性自改进

summary.zh: 介绍GPT-Red，OpenAI的自动红队系统，使用自我博弈来提高AI安全性和鲁棒性。展示了自动化安全测试在AI开发中的应用。
summary.en: Introduces GPT-Red, OpenAI's automated red teaming system that uses self-play to improve AI safety and robustness. Demonstrates the application of automated security testing in AI development.

title.zh: 速腾聚创发布第二代全固态感知平台，定位为物理AI数据入口
title.en: RoboSense launches second-gen solid-state perception platform as physical AI data gateway

summary.zh: 速腾聚创推出第二代全固态感知平台，旨在为AI模型提供高精度三维空间数据，推动具身智能发展。该平台可能成为机器人理解物理世界的关键技术。
summary.en: RoboSense introduces its second-generation solid-state perception platform, aiming to provide high-precision 3D spatial data for AI models and advance embodied intelligence. Could be key for robots to understand the physical world.

title.zh: 月泉仿生获数亿元融资，仿生灵巧手实现万台量产
title.en: MoonSpring Bionics secures hundreds of millions in funding for bionic dexterous hand mass production

summary.zh: 月泉仿生完成Pre-A+轮融资，用于仿生神经骨骼肌肉机器人研发。公司已实现仿生灵巧手的万台量产，订单超亿，推动具身智能商业化。
summary.en: MoonSpring Bionics closes Pre-A+ funding round for bionic neuromuscular skeleton robot R&D. The company has achieved mass production of bionic dexterous hands with over 10,000 units and orders exceeding 100 million, advancing embodied AI commercialization.

title.zh: 青心意创推出80cm高毛绒人形机器人，搭载自研AI操作系统
title.en: Qingxin Yichuang unveils 80cm tall furry humanoid robot with proprietary AI OS

summary.zh: 青心意创发布首款智能机器人Amoo，身高80cm，拟人双足，配备全传感器和自研操作系统。该机器人可进行情感交互，展示了AI在消费机器人领域的应用。
summary.en: Qingxin Yichuang launches its first intelligent robot Amoo, standing 80cm tall with human-like bipedal design, full sensors, and proprietary OS. Capable of emotional interaction, it showcases AI applications in consumer robotics.
